name: Pastry for Pumpkin Pie in Walnut Crust
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Ice water; or up to 5 tablespoons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, walnuts, sugar, and salt.
2. With a pastry blender or 2 knives, cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add ice water, 1 tablespoon at a time, and stir lightly with a fork just until a soft, manageable pastry forms.
4. Divide the pastry into 2 balls.
5. Between 2 sheets of floured wax paper, roll out one ball to an 11-inch round.
6. Remove the top sheet of wax paper and invert the pastry into a 9-inch pie plate, letting excess extend over the edge.
7. Remove the remaining sheet of waxed paper.
8. Trim the pastry edge even with the rim of the plate.
9. To make braided pastry, between sheets of floured waxed paper, roll out the remaining ball of pastry and any pastry scraps to a 10 x 4 1/2-inch rectangle.
10. Remove the top sheet of waxed paper.
11. Cut the rectangle lengthwise into twelve 3/8-inch wide strips.
12. Braid three of these strips together; repeat this process with the remaining strips.
13. With water, moisten the rim of the pastry in the pie plate.
14. Place the braids around the rim of the plate.
15. Trim off any excess braid and pat the ends together where they meet.
